code: import React,{createContext,useContext,useState,useEffect}from'react';import axios from'axios';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const AuthContext=/*#__PURE__*/createContext();const API_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'http://localhost:8000/api';export function AuthProvider(_ref){let{children}=_ref;const[isAdmin,setIsAdmin]=useState(false);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);useEffect(()=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('adminToken');if(token)setIsAdmin(true);setLoading(false);},[]);const login=async(username,password)=>{const res=await axios.post("".concat(API_URL,"/auth/login/"),{username,password},{headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}});localStorage.setItem('adminToken',res.data.access);setIsAdmin(true);return res.data;};const logout=()=>{localStorage.removeItem('adminToken');setIsAdmin(false);};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AuthContext.Provider,{value:{isAdmin,login,logout,loading},children:children});}export function useAuth(){return useContext(AuthContext);}
